notes: iter15 minimal 2-event schema (project_start + message_result, no message_field_delta, no data:[DONE] terminator) STILL fails to render '차단', BUT failure mode is DIFFERENT from iter14 — meaningful new signal. iter14 (4-event) failed at SSE line parser: 'Unexpected token \'d\', "data: [DONE]" is not valid JSON' and showed genspark's generic error UI ('응답 생성 중 오류'). iter15 (2-event) gets PAST line parsing (no JSON parse error this time) and reaches a DEEPER callback: 'processLineCallback error TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading \'session_state\'), [object Object]' at CT_QhYaz.js:7 — and produces NO assistant bubble / NO error UI at all (only user prompt echo). So iter15 confirms: (a) removing data:[DONE] terminator was correct (line parser happy), (b) project_start event needs a 'session_state' field (currently we send project_id+conversation_id only — real genspark project_start likely embeds session_state object), (c) message_field_delta is NOT strictly required for line parsing — schema progressed further. Stale iter14 error text 'Unexpected token data: [DONE]' is still visible in chat history above (NOT from this run — that's leftover DOM from #1034). Next iter16 axis: add session_state:{} (or richer object) to project_start payload; re-inspect HAR #1031 for exact project_start field shape (especially session_state subtree).
